title: IVR Call Result
description: IVR v1 call result contract. IVR result is an input signal only and must be handed off to Order Core for revalidation.
$comment: Sources: PACK-09, TECH-09, and Phase 8 SRS. IVR result cannot update order state, cancel order, confirm payment, confirm verified revenue, send notification by itself, or feed ROAS as revenue.

callback_id.description: Callback identifier sent to Order Core.

order_version_seen_by_ivr.description: Order version/concurrency token known when IVR result was produced.

result_type.description: Normalized result type such as confirm, cancel, no-answer final, invalid phone final, technical exception, or operational blocked.

result_reason.description: Machine-readable reason for result or block.

is_counted_customer_attempt.description: Whether the source attempt consumed customer attempt quota.

is_final_for_ivr.description: Whether IVR considers its work complete for the task.

recommended_core_action.description: Recommended Order Core action; advisory only and never a direct state mutation.

core_order_handoff_required.description: Whether result must be handed off to Core Order State Machine.

technical_error_code.description: Technical error code when result is technical exception.

script_version.description: IVR script version that produced the result.

privacy_policy_version.description: Privacy/retention policy version applied to result evidence.

input_signal_only.description: Invariant: IVR result is input signal only.

no_direct_order_update.description: Invariant: IVR must not directly update order state.

no_payment_or_revenue_effect.description: Invariant: IVR must not confirm payment or verified revenue.
